DP.138.0000: Welcome to the Veilstone Game Corner!\f
DP.138.0001:
Did you want some Coins for the
slots?\f
Oh, I’m sorry, you don’t have
a Coin Case to hold your Coins.
DP.138.0002:
Did you want some game Coins?\f
It’s $1000 for 50 Coins.
Would you like some?
DP.138.0003:
Thank you very much!
Here are your Coins!
DP.138.0004:
Um... You don’t appear to have
enough money...
DP.138.0005:
Oh?
Your Coin Case is full.
DP.138.0006:
Oh... You don’t need Coins, then?
Please come again!
DP.138.0007:
Ten straight bonus rounds on
the slots! That’s amazing!\f
I would say you had an explosion
of good luck!\f
So, please take this Technical Machine
as a memento!\f
DP.138.0008:
Please keep playing the slots for
another explosion of good luck!
DP.138.0009:
Oh, your Bag is full...
We will hold the TM for you.
DP.138.0010:
You can’t play if you don’t have
a Coin Case.
DP.138.0011:
I’ll explain how the slot machines
work at this Game Corner.\f
During regular play, you should
stop the reels from the left.\f
During the bonus round, watch
where CLEFAIRY points and stop\r
the reels in that order.
DP.138.0012:
Hey, kid, if you want to play here,
you need a Coin Case.\f
I think the young man next door
had one.
DP.138.0013:
I’ve been winning a ton today.
Here, take some Coins!\f
[0103,0000] received 20 Coins
from the man.\f
[0103,0000] put the Coins away in
the Coin Case.
DP.138.0014:
Listen, when CLEFAIRY appears, that’s
your chance to line up sevens.\f
Line those babies up and you’re into
the bonus round!
DP.138.0015:
Woohoo! CLEFAIRY! Look at it!
It’s driving me bananas!\f
Oh, if only you had a Coin Case!
Then you’d know what fun this is!
DP.138.0016:
Woohoo! CLEFAIRY! Look!
Yeahah! It’s a carnival!\f
Let me share some of my joy with
you!\f
[0103,0000] received 50 Coins
from the man.\f
[0103,0000] put the Coins away in
the Coin Case.
DP.138.0017:
Woohoo! CLEFAIRY! It’s adorable!
Just seeing it gets my pulse racing!\f
Oh, let me impart a piece of advice
to you!\f
If the moon turns red, you don’t
want to get a replay because it\r
makes CLEFAIRY tired!
DP.138.0018:
I want Coins, of course, but
setting records is hot, too!
DP.138.0019:
When a Poké Ball appears, it’s a
chance to line up slot marks.\f
Replays and PIKACHU line up even if
you don’t make an effort.\f
But you need to aim for better marks,
like Poké Balls and Moon Stones.
DP.138.0020:
A friend in my group scored a ton
of Coins here.\f
I’m going to challenge him!
DP.138.0021:
Sigh...
Nothing’s going my way today...\f
Are you a Trainer?
Did you battle the Gym Leader?\f
She happens to be my daughter.
She’s some kind of tough!
DP.138.0022:
Shoot for 10!
Line up those bonus rounds!\f
If you accomplish the feat of completing
10 uninterrupted bonus rounds,\r
please go to the counter.\f
You will be presented with a fabulous
prize!\f
The current record sits at
[0134,0000] straight bonus rounds!
